Table that holds information from the guests form from Canada market. For this table, besides the guest form fields there are company id and timestamps. Guests flow is only used by Canada. A guest is not a User, as a Guest has no account or profile.

values: It indicates if the record is active
2 letters ISO country code. Used for RLS
Timestamp when the guest record was created (creation_date)
Timestamp when the guest record was last updated (Updated_Timestamp)
It indicates till when the record is Active
It indicates from when the record is active

values: It indicates if the record is active  (ACTIVE_FLAG:True value for only the most recent record. All others set as False.)
Tobacco Preferences - Quantity of cigarettes smoked daily (Quantity_Cigarettes)
Consumer source value to be filled when the consumer is created via checkout - originally for Netherlands (Consumer_source)
Old field related to the connection with SPICE, no longer in use (Consumer_type)
2 letters ISO country code. Used for RLS
Sequencial number user identifier for communication with ACS  (DCS_ID)
Name of the field that is presented on the front-end to select the Expert name (expert_desc)
Name of Expert that was registered when consumer selected "Informed by IQOS expert". (expert_name)
Used in the past for reporting of Hostess activities (Hostess_category)
If customer registered through hostess form, saves store pos code (hostess_pos)
Additional IQOS-specific field for user data (iqos_field)
Customer acceptance in receiving communication and publicity (Y/N) (Marketing_research)
If customer registered through hostess form - Store location name - code (POS)
Store location identifier (identifies store location if customer registered in store) (POS_Number)
DCS user unique identifier that placed the order - Backend user (when order is placed through retailer) (retailer_id)
External identifier for the consumer on a 3rd party system. Originally contained Spice id (SPICE_id)
If customer registered through hostess form - store location name, a.e "IQOS Boutique Calgary" (Touchpoint_name)
Whether the user\'s age has been verified (age_verified)
Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current day (Number_visits_this_today)
Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current month (Number_visits_this_month)
Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current week (Number_visits_this_week)
Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in current year (Number_visits_this_year)
Local date time - Customer first login (First_login)
Contains all  user groups associated to one consumer (UserGroups)
Customer acceptance to receive communication through email (iqos_email_opt_in)
Customer acceptance to receive communication through phone (iqos_phone_opt_in)
Customer acceptance to receive communication through sms (iqos_sms_opt_in)
Date time (local) of user last login at Iqos store (Last_login)
Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits in last 3 months (Number_visits_last_3_months)
Customer login email (unique identifier for ACS connection)  (Login)
Customer member type (10 - Age non verified; 20 - Age verified) (member_type)
Customer name (concatenation from first and last name) (User_name)
Customer acceptance to receive communication token (optin_token)
Customer acceptance in receiving iqos club program communication (true/false) (personalized_communication)
Customer acceptance on iqos club program terms and conditions (true/false) (personalized_experience)
Date when the phone number validation was performed (phone_number_validation_date)
Whether the user\'s phone number has been validated (phone_number_validated)
Timestamp (UTC) that marks indicates when the profile was completed, based on update of email, password and required fields. Created for Portugal (profile_completed)
Profile status - "active" or "inactive", based on last update (Profile_status)
Local date time when profile was last updated (Updated_Date___Time)
Refers to an old configuration that is no longer in use. (Reference)
Order status code identifier (values vary per market): (Status)
Customer acceptance of terms and conditions (Y/N) (terms_and_conditions)
It can be consumer, retailer, admin (UserType)
Timestamp when the user record was last updated (updated_at)
Statistics - Counter for consumer number of visits  (Number_visits)
